text: Hello? Hello. Hi. This is Nancy with U.S. Medical Supplies. I hope I caught you at a good time. You're welcome, Nancy. I'm going to have to continue a glucose monitor. It lets you track your blood trigger without pricking your finger. Ah! Do you have diabetes?
